mapper.select: SELECT user_id, password, email, nickname, profile_image, introduction, gender, name, birth, created_at, withdrawal_status, withdrawal_date, pwd_changed_at, check_privacy, check_service, email_verified FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_id, password, email, nickname, gender, name, birth, check_privacy,check_service, email_verified ) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{email},#{nickname},#{gender},#{name},#{birth}, #{checkPrivacy}, #{checkService}, #{emailVerified})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE name=#{name} AND email=#{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, pwd_changed_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET profile_image = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE withdrawal_status = 0
SELECT nickname FROM users WHERE user_id=#{userId}
